title: AI is entering a new phase — and these are the stocks investors should be watching
summary_full: CNBC's Paulina Likos and Zev Fima discuss Wall Street's shift from AI euphoria toward rationalization and what it means for investors.
summary_public: CNBC's Paulina Likos and Zev Fima discuss Wall Street's shift from AI euphoria toward rationalization and what it means for investors.
